title: This Ferrari should have been a Volkswagen
content: It may be the NBA playoffs but right now Ferrari is getting dunked on more than anyone. title: American Airlines is getting Starlink Wi-Fi
content: American Airlines is planning to install SpaceX's Starlink Wi-Fi in hundreds of its airplanes, the airline announced today. American says the deployment will start in the first quarter of 2027, and will span more than 500 aircraft, including its new A321XLR and A321neo planes from Airbus. Starlink w

title: Jony Ive’s Ferrari looks nothing like a Ferrari
content: Ferrari makes some of the fastest cars on the planet, so it's anyone's guess how the Italian automaker ended up being so incredibly late to the EV party. title: Uber president says AI spending is getting ‘harder to justify’
content: After reportedly exhausting its annual AI budget just four months into 2026, Uber is now questioning whether it's actually seeing meaningful returns on its investments. title: Ferrari reveals its first EV, with design help from Jony Ive
content: After months of teasers, Ferrari is offering the first full view of its Luce electric vehicle. The Luce is notable not just for being Ferrari's first EV, but for being designed in collaboration with Jony Ive and Mark Newson at their collective LoveFrom. title: RCSP: Risk-Sensitive Conjectural Scenario Planning for Safe Dynamic Robot Navigation
